strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React matching the primary stack
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly aligned with AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus testing workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed despite being primary stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)
PostgreSQL not mentioned; database experience skews to MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of polyglot full-stack experience with a strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work from their current role. Engineering craftsmanship is evident through TDD advocacy, open-source projects, and teaching. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, PostgreSQL, and recent Kotlin experience, but the breadth and depth of adjacent skills suggest these are learnable rather than blocking.
